title: Dextroamphetamine and Amphetamine: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text: ine. Other medications may cause dosing changes or extra monitoring when taken with dextroamphetamine and amphetamine. Make sure you have discussed any medications you are currently taking or plan to take before starting dextroamphetamine and amphetamine with your doctor and pharmacist. Before starting, stopping, or changing any medications while taking dextroamphetamine and amphetamine, please get the advice of your doctor or pharmacist. the following nonprescription or herbal products may interact with dextroamphetamine and amphetamine: St. John's wort; nutritional supplements including glutamic acid (L-glutamine); tryptophan; sodium bicarbonate (Arm and Hammerâ¢ Baking Soda, Soda Mint); sodium phosphate; antacids and other medications for heartburn or ulcers such as cimetidine (Tagamet Â® ), esomeprazole (Nexium Â® ), omeprazole (Prilosec Â® ); allergy medications (diphenhydramine, loratadine, fexofenadine, chlorpheniramine or cetirizine). Be sure to let your doctor and pharmacist know that you are taking these medications before you start taking dextroamphetamine and amphetamine.
